description: Run DuckLake tests with deletion vectors enabled (puffin format instead of parquet delete files).

skip_tests.reason: Parquet is statically loaded in this config, test requires missing parquet
Deletion vectors are written as puffin files, not *-del*.parquet, so the parquet glob assertion does not apply
Reads the delete file directly as parquet (DESCRIBE/SELECT of *-delete.parquet) to inspect its columns/contents
